processors.name: CUDA Memory Safety Validator
processors.description: Detects CUDA allocations without corresponding frees or error checks. Activated by .iarch rules with PLUGIN.ID: cuda-memory-validator.

processors.name: CUDA Error Check Validator
processors.description: Detects CUDA API calls and kernel launches without error checking. Activated by .iarch rules with PLUGIN.ID: cuda-error-check-validator.
